_comment_mail: Mail backend. 'applescript' uses macOS Mail.app (default). 'imap' uses any IMAP server (cross-platform); IMAP_PASSWORD goes into .env.
_comment_todoist: Project IDs that the [ACTION:TASKS] reads from + [ACTION:ADDTASK] can write to. hilo_section restricts the HILO project to one section.
_comment_briefing: Morning briefing only fires before this hour; after it, just a short greeting. Politik news source is separate from the general news feed.
_comment_proactive: Times of day (24h, HH:MM) at which Jarvis proactively pushes an update. Each slot fires at most once per day.
_comment_telegram: Telegram bot config (issue #47). chat_id restricts who the bot answers to (find via the bot itself: send a message, then /api/getUpdates). Whisper model is local: tiny | base | small | medium | large (size + accuracy trade-off).
_comment_mail_monitor: IMAP IDLE push monitor (issue #48). Multiple accounts in parallel. Each account's password lives in env IMAP_PASSWORD_{NAME_UPPER}. Categories: werbung | info | handlungsbedarf — only the listed ones forward to Telegram. Quiet hours suppress pushes.
